title: S&P 500 Falls in Retreat From Risk as Block Cuts Spur AI Anxiety
description: US stocks dropped as risk-off sentiment swept through markets and fintech Block Inc.’s massive layoffs fanned angst that artificial-intelligence risks upending broad sections of the economy.
content: US stocks dropped as risk-off sentiment swept through markets and fintech Block Inc.’s massive layoffs fanned angst that artificial-intelligence risks upending broad sections of the economy.
